Universal.title: The neighbourhood
Universal.text: Universal is one of Paphos' most sought-after residential quarters — moments from Kings Avenue Mall, the harbour and the Blue-Flag beaches of Kato Paphos, with the international airport just fifteen minutes away. Its tree-lined avenues blend everyday convenience — schools, clinics, cafés and boutiques all within walking distance — with the relaxed rhythm of the Mediterranean coast, making it a favourite for both permanent residents and investors.

Kato Paphos.title: The neighbourhood
Kato Paphos.text: Kato Paphos is the coastal heart of the city — home to the UNESCO-listed archaeological park, the medieval harbour and a string of Blue-Flag beaches. Restaurants, marinas and five-star resorts line the seafront, while the old town's culture and amenities are moments inland.

Coral Bay.title: The neighbourhood
Coral Bay.text: Coral Bay is Paphos' most sought-after coastal resort — a crescent of golden Blue-Flag sand framed by low headlands, with a lively strip of tavernas, beach bars and boutiques just behind. Long a favourite for holiday homes and rental investors, it blends easy seaside living with quick access to Peyia's amenities and Paphos city fifteen minutes away.

Agios Nicolaos.title: The neighbourhood
Agios Nicolaos.text: Agios Nicolaos is a well-connected quarter in the heart of Limassol, Cyprus' most cosmopolitan city. Residents are moments from the business district, international schools and the energy of the seafront, with the Limassol Marina — its designer boutiques, yacht berths and waterfront dining — only a short drive away. City-centre living puts cafés, amenities and transport links on the doorstep, while a new generation of gated developments brings a quieter, contemporary standard of living to the neighbourhood.

Chloraka.title: The neighbourhood
Chloraka.text: Chloraka is a sought-after coastal community just north-west of Paphos town, where a green residential hillside rolls gently down to a rocky shoreline and a small fishing harbour. Long favoured by international buyers, it pairs quiet surroundings and open sea views with everyday convenience — shops, tavernas and schools close at hand — while the old town, the marina and Paphos' Blue-Flag beaches are only minutes away along the coast.
